creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
Created attachment 202682
mailzu-php-flavours

Hi,

As maintainer of security/mailzu I've added php flavours to this port. 

I've tested this small update with poudriere. You can check logs:
http://pkg.bsdserwis.com/pkg/data/11x64-testing-php71/2019-03-07_12h58m57s/logs/mailzu-php71-0.8.r3_6.log and http://pkg.bsdserwis.com/pkg/data/11x64-testing-php72/2019-03-07_12h42m13s/logs/mailzu-php72-0.8.r3_6.log

Thanks a lot for commit.
